overview: libpng could be made to crash if it opened a specially crafted file.
description:
It was discovered that the libpng simplified API incorrectly handled
quantizing RGB images. If a user or automated system were tricked into
opening a specially crafted PNG file, an attacker could use this issue to
cause libpng to crash, resulting in a denial of service.

full_text:
Ubuntu Security Notices

USN-8039-1

 

 

 

 

 

 
USN-8039-1: libpng vulnerability

 

 

 

 
Publication date

 

 

 
12 February 2026

 

 

 

 

 
Overview

 

 

 
libpng could be made to crash if it opened a specially crafted file.

 

 

 

 

 
Releases

 

 

 

 25.10

 24.04 LTS

22.04 LTS

 

 

 

 

 

 

 Open side navigation
 

 

 
Packages

 

 libpng1.6 - PNG (Portable Network Graphics) file library
 

 

 
Details

 

 

It was discovered that the libpng simplified API incorrectly handled
quantizing RGB images. If a user or automated system were tricked into
opening a specially crafted PNG file, an attacker could use this issue to
cause libpng to crash, resulting in a denial of service.

 

 

 

It was discovered that the libpng simplified API incorrectly handled
quantizing RGB images. If a user or automated system were tricked into
opening a specially crafted PNG file, an attacker could use this issue to
cause libpng to crash, resulting in a denial of service.

 

 

 

 
Update instructions

 

 

 

 

In general, a standard system update will make all the necessary changes.

 Learn more about how to get the fixes.
 

 

 

 

 
The problem can be corrected by updating your system to the following package versions:

 

 

 

 

 Ubuntu Release
 Package Version
 

 25.10

questing

 libpng16-16t64 – 

1.6.50-1ubuntu0.4

 

 24.04

LTS noble

 libpng16-16t64 – 

1.6.43-5ubuntu0.5

 

 22.04

LTS jammy

 libpng16-16 – 

1.6.37-3ubuntu0.4

 Ubuntu Pro provides ten-year security coverage to 25,000+ packages in Main and Universe repositories, and it is free for up to five machines.
